objective: Restore clean-checkout exact-head CI by preserving the caller-supplied Unified latest path through the existing non-symlink admission check, then proving the fail-closed boundary and prerequisite-aware paper-reality CLI with synthetic fixtures only.
executable_blocker: The existing loader resolves the Unified latest path before checking whether the supplied path is a symlink, so a same-directory symlink is accepted and the frozen negative contract is false.
source_change_limit: In load_unified_product_context, do not resolve unified_latest_path before _read_object has enforced the existing regular non-symlink file boundary. Resolve only the accepted path for containment and returned canonical context. No other runtime or domain behavior may change.

interface_contract.positive_case: A complete internally consistent synthetic Unified latest pointer, snapshot, core snapshot and recommendation produces CLI status ok in dry-run without canonical write.
negative_cases: missing Unified latest pointer returns exit 1 and no domain mutation
same-directory symlink Unified latest pointer returns exit 1 before target resolution and no domain mutation
malformed Unified pointer returns exit 1 and no domain mutation
binding drift returns exit 1 and no domain mutation
interface_contract.ci_rule: Replace only the impossible clean-checkout reality-loop invocation with the prerequisite-aware conformance test; do not suppress, continue, skip or downgrade failure.
interface_contract.authority_rule: Synthetic fixtures and the boundary fix grant no live, order, private API, registry writer, deployment or external mutation authority.

acceptance_commands: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 -m pytest -q -p no:cacheprovider tests/test_paper_reality_loop_cli.py tests/test_unified_product_access.py tests/test_paper_reality_loop.py
private secret, network, live-authority, skip and exact write-set scan
rollback: Agent 0 reverts the scoped private runtime, conformance-test and CI workflow commits and deletes the isolated stage branch. The original dirty checkout, domain state, external services and public Bridge runtime remain unchanged.
